title: Hardcore-ban
description:
Hardcore Ban Mod
The Hardcore Ban Mod enhances the gameplay experience by automatically banning players for 24 hours upon their death.
body:
# Hardcore Ban Mod
The Hardcore Ban Mod enhances the gameplay experience by automatically banning players for 24 hours upon their death. This mod is designed for server-side use only and integrates seamlessly with Minecraft to enforce a stricter gameplay environment.

### Key Features:

- Automatic Bans: When a player dies in the game, the mod automatically issues a 24-hour ban using the /tempban command.
- Detailed Ban Reason: The ban command includes detailed information about the cause of death, the exact time of death (formatted as "dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm
"), and the coordinates where the death occurred.

### **Requires Note**: This mod requires another mod, such as [BanHammer](https://modrinth.com/mod/banhammer), to function correctly with the /tempban command.
How It Works:

## **Not set your world in Hardcore!!**

Player Death Event: The mod listens for player death events.
Collects Information: It gathers details such as the cause of death, the time of death, and the coordinates of the death.
Executes Ban Command: The mod executes a command to ban the player for 24 hours and includes the collected details in the ban reason.
This mod is ideal for servers looking to implement more challenging rules and provide players with detailed feedback about their in-game actions and consequences.

Please help me, I play League of Legends
